title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXIX. Paradoxes.
content:
[The following occurs in a MS. of the seventeenth century, in the Sloane Collection, the reference to which I have mislaid.]

        The man in the wilderness asked me,
        How many strawberries grew in the sea?
        I answered him, as I thought good,
        As many as red herrings grew in the wood.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXIX. Paradoxes."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
